# AGENTS.md

> Use braid — append-only knowledge store with coherence verification.

## Session Lifecycle

```bash
braid status                              # Where you are + next action
braid observe "insight" --confidence 0.8  # Capture knowledge
braid harvest --commit                    # End-of-session: knowledge → datoms
braid seed --inject AGENTS.md             # Refresh this section
```

  - The drift-management module (INV-021/022/023, ADR-012/013/014) is the newest addition. It defines: Drift Detection Completeness (every drift form detectable), Reconciliation Monotonicity (drift only decreases),
  - The meta-spec uses a two-tier mode: constitution + largest module must fit within target_lines (4000) with a hard ceiling of 5000. This is the CONTEXT BUDGET concept - specs must be loadable in a single LLM context window.

  - The ddis-modular project has a parent-child spec relationship. manifest.yaml defines the meta-spec (DDIS standard itself). Child specs (like ddis-cli-spec) have parent_spec: ddis-modular. The meta-spec defines WHAT a well-formed DDIS spec is
